attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_HR_ASGN_PR_MP.HR_ASGN_ID_SEQ, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_HR_ASGN_PR_MP.SKU_ID, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_HR_ASGN_PR_MP.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_HR_ASGN_PR_MP.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_HR_ASGN_PR_MP.CREATION_DATE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_HR_ASGN_PR_MP.CREATED_BY, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_HR_ASGN_PR_MP.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_HR_ASGN_PR_MP.ORG_ID, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_HR_ASGN_PR_MP.WORK_MGR_ID, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_HR_ASGN_PR_MP.NCE1_ID, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_HR_ASGN_PR_MP.NCE2_ID, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_HR_ASGN_PR_MP.NCE3_ID, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_HR_ASGN_PR_MP.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_HR_ASGN_PR_MP.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_HR_ASGN_PR_MP.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_HR_ASGN_PR_MP.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
$$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_HR_ASGN_PR_MP STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_HR_ASGN_PR_MP,
(
select HR_ASGN_ID_SEQ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_HR_ASGN_PR_MP
minus
select HR_ASGN_ID_SEQ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_HR_ASGN_PR_MP
) ACM
where 
 ACM.HR_ASGN_ID_SEQ = STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_HR_ASGN_PR_MP.HR_ASGN_ID_SEQ and 
 ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_HR_ASGN_PR_MP.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_HR_ASN_PRJ_MP)
